reviews_subtitle: Our valued clients refer family, friends, and associates — the highest compliment a law firm can receive.

services_featured.name: Estate Planning & Trusts
services_featured.description: Protect your family's future with wills, trusts, and comprehensive estate plans tailored to your specific needs and goals.

services_secondary.name: Real Estate Law
services_secondary.description: Residential and commercial closings, title review, contract negotiation, and dispute resolution handled with precision.

services_accent.name: Guardianships
services_accent.description: Compassionate legal guidance when a loved one needs protection. We handle adult and minor guardianship proceedings.

services_wide.name: Business & Corporate Law
services_wide.description: Entity formation, contracts, governance, and succession planning for businesses of all sizes across Illinois.

about_features.title: Allan C. Alongi, Attorney
about_features.description: Founding attorney since 1989. Dedicated to providing the highest quality legal services with a focus on effective advocacy and integrity.

about_features.title: Referral Network
about_features.description: Strong relationships with title companies, real estate firms, CPAs, and financial professionals to deliver complete client services.

about_features.title: Clarendon Hills Office
about_features.description: Conveniently located at 3 Golf Avenue. Serving Clarendon Hills, Hinsdale, Westmont, Downers Grove, and Oak Brook families.

reviews.name: Long-Time Client
reviews.text: Allan has handled our family's estate planning and real estate closings for over 20 years. His attention to detail and integrity are unmatched.

reviews.name: Business Owner
reviews.text: The Alongi firm helped us structure our business and plan for succession. They treat every client like family and always go above and beyond.

reviews.name: Referred Client
reviews.text: Was referred by my CPA and now I understand why. Allan made the guardianship process manageable and kept us informed every step of the way.
